text_en: Rappe/ant its resolutions 425 ( 1978) and 426 ( 1978) as well as its final resolutions, and more particularly its resolution 501 (1982),

text_fr: Prenant acte des lettres du representant permanent du Liban en date du 4 juin 1982 26 ,
text_en: Taking note of the letters from the Permanent Representative of Lebanon dated 4 June 1982, 26

text_fr: Profondement preoccupe par la  deterioration de  la situation  actuelle  au  Liban  et  dans  la  zone  fronta› Iiere  Iibano-israelienne et par ses consequences pour la paix et la securite dans la region,
text_en: Deeply preoccupied by the deterioration of the current situation in Lebanon and in the Iier Iiban-Israeli fronta zone and its consequences for peace and security in the region,

text_fr: Gravement preoccupe par la violation de l'integrite territoriale,  de  l'independance et  de  la  souverainete du Liban,
text_en: Gravely concerned by the violation of the territorial integrity, independence and sovereignty of Lebanon,

text_fr: Reaffirmant et  appuyant la  declaration faite  par le President  et les  membres  du  Conseil  de  securite  le 4  juin  1982 24 , ainsi  que  I' appel  urgent  lance  par  le Secretaire general le  4 juin 1982,
text_en: Reaffirming and supporting the declaration made by the President and the members of the Security Council on 4 June 1982 24 and the urgent appeal made by the Secretary General on 4 June 1982,

text_fr: Prenant acte du rapport du  Secretaire general2 7 ·
text_en: Taking note of the report of the Secretary-General2 7 ·

items_fr: 1. Engage toutes  Jes  parties  au  conflit a cesser immediatement  et  simultanement  toute  activite  mili› taire  au  Liban  et  de  part  et  d'autre de  la  frontiere libano-israelienne, et au plus  tard le  dimanche 6 juin 1982 a 6 heures, heure locale;

2. Prie tous Jes  Etats Membres qui sont en mesure de  le  faire  d'user de  leur  influence  aupres  des  inte› resses  afin  que  la  cessation  des  hostilites  declaree par  la  resolution  490  (1981)  du  Conseil  de  securite puisse etre respectee;

3. Prie le  Secretaire  general  de  tout  mettre  en reuvre  pour  assurer  l'application et  le  respect  de  Ja presente resolution et de  faire  rapport au  Conseil  de securite  des  que  possible,  et  au  plus  tard  quarante› huit heures apres l'adoption de la presente resolution.
items_en: 1. Calls upon all parties to the conflict to cease immediately and simultaneously all military activities in Lebanon and on both sides of the Lebanese-Israeli border, and no later than 6 a.m. on Sunday, 6 June 1982, local time;

2. Requests all Member States that are in a position to do so to use their influence on the institutions so that the cessation of the hostilites declared by Security Council Resolution 490 (1981) can be respected;

3. Requests the Secretary-General to make every effort to ensure the implementation of and respect for Ja present resolution and to report to the Security Council as soon as possible, and not later than forty› eight hours after the adoption of this resolution.

items_en: I. Demands that Israel immediately and inadvertently withdraw all its military forces to the internationally recognized borders of Lebanon;

(ii) that all parties strictly comply with the provisions of paragraph I of Resolution 508 (1982), which called for the immediate and simultaneous cessation of all military activities in Lebanon and on both sides of the Lebanese-Israeli border;
3. Dcmandc has all parties to notify the Secretary-General of their acceptance of the present reso› reading in Jes twenty-four hours;
4. Decides to remain seized of the matter.

text_en: Decisions

text_fr: A  sa  2379e  seance,  le  18  juin  1982,  le  Conseil  a decide  d'inviter Jes  representants d'Israel, du  Liban, des  Pays-Bas,  de  la  Republique  arabe  syrienne et de la  Suede a participer, sans droit  de vote, a la discus› sion de  la  question  intitulee  "La situation au  Moyen› Orient :  rapport  du  Secretaire  general  sur  la  Force interimaire  des  Nations  Unies  au  Liban  (S/15194  et Add. I et 2 29 )''.
text_en: At its 2379th meeting, on 18 June 1982, the Council decided to invite the representatives of Israel, Lebanon, the Netherlands, the Syrian Arab Republic and Sweden to participate, without the right to vote, in the discussion of the question entitled "The situation in the Middle East: report of the Secretary-General on the United Nations Interim Force in Lebanon (S/15194 and Add. I and 2 29).'

text_fr: A  la  meme seance,  le  Conseil  a  egalement decide, a la  suite d'un vote.  qu'une invitation a participer au debat  serait  adressee  au  representant  de  !'Organisa› tion  de  liberation  de  la  Palestine  et  que  cette  invi› tation lui  confererait les  memes droits de participation
text_en: At the same time, the Council also decided, following a vote, that an invitation to take part in the debate would be addressed to the representative of the Organization for the Liberation of Palestine and that this invitation would confer on him the same rights of participation.
